title: Socratic phase-1 evidence
description: Evidence produced by the socratic phase-1 agent: the OPEN leaves of the Question Tree surfaced as a list of clarifying questions (one per OPEN leaf), plus a manifest of the phase-1 .adoc artifacts and the run id whose `mm-tree-socratic-phase1` artifact holds them.

run_id.description: GitHub Actions run id of the phase-1 run.

questions.description: OPEN leaves rendered as questions the team must answer before phase 2.

id.description: Question id, e.g. the leaf's Q-ID 'Q1.4.1'.
